# krateo-frontend (code repo) — LLM doc index

> The Krateo Composable Portal: a React 19 + Vite single-page app whose entire UI is
> **server-driven**. The SPA renders no hardcoded pages — it fetches `Widget` custom resources
> (resolved to JSON by snowplow) and maps each `kind` to a React component via an auto-discovered
> widget registry. Routes, sidebar, and content all come from CRs at runtime. This index is the
> agent entry point to the **internals & runtime** view. The **deployment, CRD-schema and wiring**
> view lives in the chart repo `braghettos/krateo-frontend-chart` `docs/`.

## How to use this index (agents)

You are reading the docs for a SPECIFIC deployed version. Fetch every file below **at the tag that
matches the running build**, not `main`:

- **image version** = the frontend Deployment's container image tag → THIS repo's git tag
  (== the chart's `appVersion`, stamped from this repo's latest semver tag). Read this repo's
  `docs/` at the **image-version** tag.
- **chart version** = `CompositionDefinition.spec.chart.version` for frontend → the
  `braghettos/krateo-frontend-chart` repo tag. Read the deployment/CRD/wiring docs there at the
  **chart-version** tag.

If something isn't in the docs, read the source at that same tag — don't guess, and don't trust
`main` for a deployed older version. Every claim in these docs is traced to `file:line`; if a doc
and the code disagree, the code wins.

## Start here (internals & runtime)

- [architecture.md](architecture.md): how the SPA is built — entry point, the provider stack, the
  server-driven widget registry, the data-fetch layer, and the routing model. Read first.
- [behavior.md](behavior.md): runtime behavior — runtime config (`config.json`), the upstream
  contracts (authn / snowplow / events), auth + token handling, the `/call` widget-fetch protocol,
  pagination, and actions (rest/navigate/drawer/modal/SSE).
- [gotchas.md](gotchas.md): real runtime pitfalls grounded in the code/config.

## Widget-author & contributor reference (human-oriented, also useful to agents)

- [widget-authoring.md](widget-authoring.md): how an antd component becomes a widget; the
  `schema.json → types/CRD` pipeline; scaffolding; auto-registration.
- [widgets-api-reference.md](widgets-api-reference.md): generated per-widget API reference.
- [docs.md](docs.md): the widget concept (a widget is a CRD mapped to a UI element).
- [form-values.md](form-values.md), [autocomplete-and-dependencies.md](autocomplete-and-dependencies.md),
  [restactions.md](restactions.md): authoring topics.
- [guides/](guides/): worked end-to-end guides (action-button, simple-page).

## Source of truth

- `src/widgets/<Kind>/` — each widget: `<Kind>.schema.json` (the CRD source of truth),
  `<Kind>.tsx` (the component), `index.ts` (the `defineWidget` registration).
- `src/types/Widget.d.ts` — the `Widget` / `ResourceRef` / `WidgetActions` shapes the SPA consumes.
- `public/config/config.json` — the runtime config contract (API base URLs + INIT/ROUTES_LOADER).
